rulings.Case Title: DAVID STOOPS ET AL VS. 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC., GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC., YAT-PANG AU, 300 BUCHANAN C1, LLC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint is continued to September 6, 2019 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OLUSOJI FANOIKI VS. 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT BRIAN REED, 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET HOMEOWNERS' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Preliminary Injunction is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Injunction lifted per July 12, 2019 hearing and July 29, 2019 order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TON KIANG RESTAURANT, INC. VS. WILLIAM WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WONG, WWJW FAMILY LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts showing that per Father's directions William took title and Plaintiff took care of any and all funds involved in the transfer and any attendant debt servicing. (FAC, paragraph 11). Facts should include description of the "funds," "debt" and payments, if any. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages And Exhibit A
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT PAULINE TOM, JIMMY BACH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages And Exhibit A is continued to September 5, 2019 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL OROPEZA VS. BRANDIE OLESEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL OROPEZA Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Judgment is OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for August 7, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SHRITEA WHITE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT SHRITEA WHITE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to present a courtesy copy of the proof of service for this motion at the time of the hearing. Defendant to file and serve answer no later than August 6, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ATALEN, LLC VS. JACKIE LONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT JACKIE LONG DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NICK DROGITIS VS. BERNARD NORRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Defendants' Motion To Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT BERNARD NORRIS, JASMINE MACKINS Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment GRANTED subject to (1) Defendants' posting $2,650 with the Court no later than August 6, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. and (2) thereafter filing and serving answers no later than 2:00 p.m. on August 6, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN ALLEN VS. MARISSA FELIZARDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To: 1. Form Interrogatories; 2. Special Interrogatories; 3. Request For Production Of Documents; 4. Request For Admissions; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT MARISSA FELIZARDO MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To: 1. Form Interrogatories; 2. Special Interrogatories; 3. Request For Production Of Documents; 4. Request For Admissions; And For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses to Special Interrogatories, Forms Interrogatories and Request for production within 2 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $700 to be paid by August 12, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Relief From Default And Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Supporting Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 06, 2019 line 10. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MURCIA Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Relief From Default And Default Judgment GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to (1) post $6,600 with the Court no later than August 6, 2019 and (2) thereafter file and serve answer no later than August 6, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: K MIRANDA VS. SARAH LITTLE ET AL
